overview: E-learning platform for IT courses with MERN stack and Next.js. Role-based access, pricing plans, and course content (lessons, chapters).
goals: Provide IT course catalog and structured learning (chapters, lessons)
Support free preview and paid full access per plan
Authenticate users via Google and GitHub OAuth
Process payments and plan upgrades via Stripe

userStories.title: User registration and login
userStories.description: Users can sign up and sign in via Google or GitHub OAuth (NextAuth).

userStories.title: Browse courses
userStories.description: Users can view course list and course details; free users see introductions only.
acceptanceCriteria: Course detail page shows intro/full content based on subscription

userStories.title: Access lessons and chapters
userStories.description: Paid subscribers can access full lessons and chapters.
acceptanceCriteria: Chapters and lessons load for authorized users

userStories.title: Pricing and payment
userStories.description: Users can view plans (Entry, Most Used, Pro) and pay via Stripe.

userStories.title: Admin and dashboard
userStories.description: Admins can manage courses, chapters, and users via dashboard.

functionalRequirements: Frontend: Next.js app on port 3000; backend: Express API on port 4000
Auth: NextAuth (Google, GitHub); API may use JWT/Bearer for protected routes
Database: MongoDB; models: User, Course, Chapter, Lesson, Admin
